sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76935" key="palinhnemi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλῐ-νηνεμία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n76935.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">returning calm,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.102</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Bass.</author> </bibl>; <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυν-</orth>).</sense> </entryFree>
